message:
feat: wire SnapshotEngine into ObservationRuntime (wa-2l27x.4)

Add snapshot_config option to ObservationRuntime with builder method.
When enabled, the runtime spawns a SnapshotEngine periodic loop that
captures mux session state (topology + pane state) to SQLite via a
watch-channel shutdown bridge. Also fix PathBuf comparison in
restore_process.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
